synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2026-0696 Important: Oracle Linux 9 net-snmp security update
description:
[5.9.1-17.0.1.1]
- fix error index value when snmpget is used a proxy pass [Orabug: 35010262]

[1:5.9.1-17.1]
- fix out of bound access issue (RHEL-137510)
- enable PQC (RHEL-132653)
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2026-0696

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2026-0696.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 9 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
net-snmp-5.9.1-17.0.1.el9_7.1.x86_64.rpm
net-snmp-agent-libs-5.9.1-17.0.1.el9_7.1.i686.rpm
net-snmp-agent-libs-5.9.1-17.0.1.el9_7.1.x86_64.rpm
net-snmp-devel-5.9.1-17.0.1.el9_7.1.i686.rpm
net-snmp-devel-5.9.1-17.0.1.el9_7.1.x86_64.rpm
net-snmp-libs-5.9.1-17.0.1.el9_7.1.i686.rpm
net-snmp-libs-5.9.1-17.0.1.el9_7.1.x86_64.rpm
net-snmp-perl-5.9.1-17.0.1.el9_7.1.x86_64.rpm
net-snmp-utils-5.9.1-17.0.1.el9_7.1.x86_64.rpm
python3-net-snmp-5.9.1-17.0.1.el9_7.1.x86_64.rpm

aarch64:
net-snmp-5.9.1-17.0.1.el9_7.1.aarch64.rpm
net-snmp-agent-libs-5.9.1-17.0.1.el9_7.1.aarch64.rpm
net-snmp-devel-5.9.1-17.0.1.el9_7.1.aarch64.rpm
net-snmp-libs-5.9.1-17.0.1.el9_7.1.aarch64.rpm
net-snmp-perl-5.9.1-17.0.1.el9_7.1.aarch64.rpm
net-snmp-utils-5.9.1-17.0.1.el9_7.1.aarch64.rpm
python3-net-snmp-5.9.1-17.0.1.el9_7.1.aarch64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol9/SRPMS-updates/net-snmp-5.9.1-17.0.1.el9_7.1.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-68615




Description of changes:

[5.9.1-17.0.1.1]
- fix error index value when snmpget is used a proxy pass [Orabug: 35010262]

[1:5.9.1-17.1]
- fix out of bound access issue (RHEL-137510)
- enable PQC (RHEL-132653)
